properties.responsibilities: Upload meeting recordings; observe pipeline progress; view/download transcripts; review and edit generated protocols; export protocols to PDF; delete own meetings and derived artifacts.
properties.name: AUTHOR
properties.description: The end-user who uploads a meeting recording and owns the derived artifacts (Recording, Transcript, Protocol). The sole active human role at MVP. Merges BA roles ROL-01 Author and ROL-02 Reviewer (the Reviewer has no distinct behavior at MVP per BA assumption).

properties.responsibilities: Run TranscriptionJob workflow (ASR + diarization); auto-create ProtocolGenerationJob on transcript completion; run LLM protocol generation; persist Transcript and Protocol artifacts; update Meeting.status as the pipeline progresses; record error_reason on failures.
properties.name: SYSTEM
properties.description: Infrastructure role representing automated background workers and async pipeline machinery. Owns job lifecycles (transcription, protocol generation), auto-triggers downstream jobs per BRQ-007, and writes Meeting.status updates per BRQ-008. No BA mapping; not user-facing.
